last_reasoning: The initial setup of the BudE system requires creation of core files and directories. The agent files will be used to develop the coder, researcher, system architect, and crypto analyst agents. The dashboard index.html file will provide a basic interface for human interaction. The memory.json file will store evolution history and decisions. The next step is to implement the functionality of each agent and improve the dashboard interface.

tasks.text: Integrate agent functionalities with the dashboard
Improve error handling and logging mechanisms
